briefs.ny-stlawrence-massena:
Massena Hydro Campus is in St. Lawrence County (NY, NYISO) and scores 81 of 100. Adjacent to NYPA St. Lawrence-FDR hydro and former Alcoa works; cheap firm hydro power, cold climate. Its stronger marks are land (93) and risk (92). The closest substation is about 1.2 km out, with a rough 772 MW of headroom, power near $34 per MWh, and an interconnection wait around 5.7 years.

Summer wet-bulb runs about 17.3°C, which caps how many hours the site can lean on free cooling and shapes its PUE. The softer areas are power & interconnection (69) and labor & construction (73). FEMA maps it as flood zone X, seismic hazard reads moderate, and hurricane exposure is very low. It falls inside a federal Opportunity Zone. NY §1115(a)(37) internet-data-center sales-tax exemption currently applies but faces proposed repeal (S9288, Feb 2026) — treat as under legislative review.

Read together, this is a power-constrained, cool-climate site. On these numbers it belongs near the top of the diligence list.

TX HB 1223 state sales-tax exemption (10–15 yr) + Chapter 403 / JETI Act property-value limitation (50%, up to 75% in an Opportunity Zone).
